name: Insert node before head in Doubly Linked List
category: Learn LinkedList [Single LL, Double LL, Medium, Hard Problems]
statement: Given the head of a doubly linked list and an integer X, insert a node with value X before the head of the linked list and return the head of the modified list.
constraints:
• n == Number of nodes in the Linked List
  • 1 <= n <= 100
  • 0 <= ListNode.val <= 100
  • 0 <= X <= 100

examples.explanation: 3 was added before the 1st node. Note that the head's value is changed.
